seoTitle: How to Connect a GoDaddy Domain to GoHighLevel 2026
metaDescription: Building funnels in GoHighLevel with a GoDaddy domain? Here's how to update DNS, add CNAME and A records, and get your site live with SSL in 2026.
intro: Connecting a GoDaddy-registered domain to GoHighLevel is mostly a DNS configuration job, and getting the records wrong is the usual reason a funnel or site won't go live. This guide walks through adding your custom domain inside GoHighLevel, updating the CNAME and A records in GoDaddy, and verifying the connection so SSL activates properly. It's aimed at anyone building funnels, websites, or automations in GHL who needs their domain pointed correctly.

steps.heading: Open your GoDaddy domain settings
steps.body: Log in to GoDaddy and go to the DNS management section for the domain you want to connect to GoHighLevel.

steps.heading: Add the custom domain inside GoHighLevel
steps.body: In your GHL account's domain settings, add the domain you plan to use so the platform can generate the DNS records it needs.

steps.heading: Add the CNAME and A records in GoDaddy
steps.body: Copy the CNAME and A record values GoHighLevel provides and enter them into your GoDaddy DNS records to point the domain at your GHL site or funnel.

steps.heading: Verify the connection and SSL setup
steps.body: Once DNS propagates, check inside GoHighLevel that the domain shows as connected and that SSL has been issued, fixing any 'domain not connected' errors that appear.

faq.question: How long does it take for the domain to connect after updating DNS?
faq.answer: DNS changes need time to propagate, so the domain may not show as connected in GoHighLevel immediately after you save the CNAME and A records in GoDaddy.

faq.question: Why does GoHighLevel say my domain is not connected?
faq.answer: This usually means the DNS records in GoDaddy don't yet match what GoHighLevel expects, or propagation hasn't finished — double-checking the CNAME and A record values is the first fix.

faq.question: Do I get SSL automatically after connecting my domain?
faq.answer: Yes — once the domain connection is verified inside GoHighLevel, SSL is set up so your site or funnel loads securely.

faq.question: Can I use this method for both funnels and full websites?
faq.answer: Yes, the same domain connection process applies whether you're pointing your GoDaddy domain at a GoHighLevel funnel or a full website.
